title: Sort 2 groups via different columns in same board
excerpt:
I would like to sort each group on a board by a different column. 
Eg: New tasks sorted by date, so I can see the newest at the top 
but Upcoming tasks sorted by Priority so I can see the Highest priority first. 
And no,…

posts.author: Esty (Esty Lizmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to sort each group on a board by a different column.

Eg: New tasks sorted by date, so I can see the newest at the top

but Upcoming tasks sorted by Priority so I can see the Highest priority first.

And no, I don’t want a new view just for this.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Etsy,

We hear what you’re saying here.

Currently, it isn’t possible to group or sort by a specific column, that being said, we encourage you to add your vote to the existing feature request, to put greater emphasis on this need. Every quarter we take the features with the top votes to our development team for a response.

You can read more about our feature request process here: All you need to know about our feature request process!
